And ''am so glad to be
A part of this great family!

hymn_title: That Wonderful Name, Jesus
verse_1:
That wonderful name, Jesus
That wonderful name, Jesus
That wonderful name, Jesus
There is no other name I know
verse_2:
The Great Redeemer, Jesus
His blood washed me clean, Jesus
And now I am saved, Jesus
There is no other name I know
verse_3:
The Great Physician, Jesus
His stripes healeth me, Jesus
And now I am whole, Jesus
There is no other name I know
verse_4:
The Great Lord of hosts, Jesus
His truth set me free, Jesus
I am free indeed, Jesus
There is no other name I know
verse_5:
The Great Provider, Jesus
He supplies my needs, Jesus
And now I am full, Jesus
There is no other name I know
verse_6:
My Great Companion, Jesus
Always by my side, Jesus
I have a sure Friend, Jesus
There is no other name I know
verse_7:
The soon-coming king, Jesus
Coming back for me, Jesus
I will reign with Him, Jesus
There is no other name I know
verse_8:
Let us praise His name, Jesus
Name above all names, Jesus
Let us shout His name, Jesus
I will sing I will shout JESUS

hymn_title: Moving Forward, Moving Forward
verse_1:
Moving forward, moving forward
No one can stop me, no one can stop me
The wind of God, the wind of God
Is blowing for me, is blowing for me
Moving forward, no one can stop me
The wind of God is blowing for me
Moving forward, moving forward
Indomitable
verse_2:
Going higher, going higher
No one can stop me, no one can stop me
Spirit of God, Spirit of God
Residing in me, residing in me
Going higher, no one can stop me
Spirit of God residing in me
Going higher, going higher
Indomitable
verse_3:
Success in life, success in life
I can never fail, I can never fail
Jesus my Christ, Jesus my Christ
He gives me the strength,
He gives me the strength
Success in life, I can never fail
Jesus my Christ, He gives me the strength
Success in life, success in life
Indomitable
verse_4:
Reaching the top, reaching the top
I won’t stop before, I won’t stop before
Everlasting arms, everlasting arms
Are lifting me up, are lifting me up
Reaching the top, I won’t stop before
Everlasting arms are lifting me up
Reaching the top, reaching the top
Indomitable
verse_5:
Forever free, forever free
No one can cage me, no one can cage me
Jesus my Lord, Jesus my Lord
Has keys of David, has keys of David
Forever free, no one can cage me
Jesus my Lord has keys of David
Forever free, forever free
Indomitable
verse_6:
I am alive, I am alive
No one call kill me, no one can kill me
My life is hid, my life is hid
In Jesus my Christ, in Jesus my Christ
I am alive, no one can kill me
My life is hid in Jesus my Christ
I am alive, I am alive
Indomitable
verse_7:
I am living, I am living
For a great purpose, for a great purpose
My destiny, my destiny
Has been fixed by God, has been fixed by God
I am living for a great purpose
My destiny has been fixed by God
I am living, I am living
Indomitable
verse_8:
Going to war, going to war
Not just to survive, not just to survive
I will triumph, I will triumph
For my God loves me, for my God loves me
Going to war not just to survive
I will triumph for my God loves me
Going to war, going to war
Indomitable
verse_9:
Indomitable, indomitable
My God is for me, my God is for me
I am stronger, I am stronger
Than my enemies, than my enemies
Indomitable, my God is for me
I am stronger than my enemies
Indomitable, indomitable
I will praise my Lord
verse_10:
Halleluyah, Halleluyah
Anthem of heaven, anthem of heaven
Halleluyah, Halleluyah
Let’s make heaven ring,
Let’s make heaven ring
Halleluyah anthem of heaven
Halleluyah, let’s make heaven ring
Halleluyah, Halleluyah
Shout Halleluyah

hymn_title: Yes, I Know I Am a Victor
chorus:
Jesus loves me and I love Him
Together we rule the world
Christ with me I will overcome
By His Blood, His Name, His Word
verse_1:
Yes, I know I am a victor
For the Bible tells me so
God made me more than a conqueror
Much stronger than all my foes
verse_2:
Yes, I know I am a victor
Stronger than sickness, disease
By His stripes I am superior
Far above infirmities
verse_3:
Yes, I know I am a victor
Stronger than demons I am
To Satan I am a terror
I am free, o yes, I am
verse_4:
Yes, I know I am a victor
Stronger than lack, poverty
All my needs Jesus provides for
I have life abundantly
verse_5:
Yes, I know I am a victor
Barrenness no more indeed
Fruitful is the God I live for
All my dreams shall be fulfilled
verse_6:
Yes, I know I am a victor
By His strength I shall succeed
No more loss and no more failure
Glory to glory proceed
verse_7:
Yes, I know I am a victor
No more sorrow, no despair
Jesus Christ is my own Succour
Tomorrow is joy and cheer
verse_8:
Yes, I know I am a victor
Very soon I’ll reign with Him
His promise is my sure anchor
He’s coming to take me home
verse_9:
Jesus loves me and I love Him
We rule this world together
As He is so right now I am
Hear me shout Halleluyah
verse_10:
Jesus loves me Halleluyah
Hear me shout Halleluyah
Halleluyah, Halleluyah
Glory be to God on high

hymn_title: There is a God, All-Sufficient
chorus:
Halleluyah, All-Sufficient 
Halleluyah, to You my Lord
There is no god like You my Lord
Worthy of my Halleluyah.
verse_1:
There is a God, All-sufficient
To clense from sins,
With His own blood
He can make you whiter than snow
Worthy of my Halleluyah
verse_2:
There is a God. All-Sufficient
To heal sickness with His own stripes
He can make you totally whole
Worthy of my Halleluyah
verse_3:
There is a God, All-Sufficient
He can set free from all bondage
Who He sets free is free indeed
Worthy of my Halleluyah
verse_4:
There is a God, All-Sufficient
To make barren very Fruitful
As for Sarah so for Hannah
Worthy of my Halleluyah
verse_5:
There is a God, All-Sufficient
To bring water from flinty rock
He will provide for all mu needs
Worthy of my Halleluyah
verse_6:
There is a God, All-Sufficient
Who can promote to lofty heights
From the dunghill to the palace
Worthy of my Halleluyah
verse_7:
There is a God, All-Sufficient
To make me strong and make me wise
By the power of His Spirit
Worthy of my Halleluyah
verse_8:
There is a God, All-Sufficient
To give mansions to all His own
I know one day He’ll come for me
Worthy of my Halleluyah
verse_9:
There is a God, All-Sufficient
Worthy of praise, adoration
With Him I’ll dwell for evermore
Worthy of my Halleluyah

hymn_title: I have a God who will never once lie
chorus:
I will sing, sing
Praise to my King
I will love, server forever,
I will sing, sing
Praise to my King
I will shout great Halleluyah
verse_1:
I have a God who will never once lie
And He is my King, He is my king
He will not fail and will never once lie
And He is my King forever
verse_2:
He owns the earth and the fullness in there
And He is my King, He is my King
He owns heaven and the angels up there
And He is my king forever
verse_3:
He spoke a word, and darkness changed to light
And He is my King, He is my King
He spoke a word and the blind got His sight
And He is my King forever
verse_4:
He breathed to mud it became living soul
And He is my King, He is my King
He breathed on sea it became solid road
And He is my King forever
verse_5:
Sarah met Him and her joy never ceased
And He is my King, He is my king
Moses met Him, his destiny fulfilled
And He is my King forever
verse_6:
He is the Doc that can heal anyone
And He is my King, He is my king And once
He speaks you consider it done
And He is my King forever
verse_7:
Now He has promised to answer my prayer
And He is my King, He is my King
To Change my sorrow and end all my tears
And He is my king forever
verse_8:
If He is yours and you too are His own
Then He is my King, He is your King
Join me to sing to our King special hymn
For He is my King and your king
verse_9:
Halleluyah to the King of all Kings
Halleluyah, Halleluyah
Halleluyah to the Lord of all Lords
Halleluyah to my great Kings

hymn_title: Let’s sing Hallelujah To Him
chorus:
I will sing, sing
Praise to my King
I will love, server forever,
I will sing, sing
Praise to my King
I will shout great Halleluyah
verse_1:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
To Him who saved our souls
From jaws of hell He rescued us
And made us sons again
verse_2:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
To Him who made us whole
He sent His word and now behold
We are healed and whole again
verse_3:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
To Him who set us free
His truth made us completely free
His blood conquered SatanChorus
verse_4:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
To Him the fruitful Vine
We draw our strength from Him within
That’s why we cannot
verse_5:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
His Name above all names
All knees must bow at His great Name
His Name answers prayers
verse_6:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
And witness for our King
He died for all and rose again
Come to Him and be saved
verse_7:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
In His own Father’s house
He’s gone to prepare us a place
Then He will come again
verse_8:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
To Husband of the Bride
One day in heaven bye and bye
He’ll marry you and I
verse_9:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
He reigneth now on high
With Him we’ll reign both you and I
For all eternity
verse_10:
Let’s sing Hallelujah
Join with heavenly hosts
The angels and Church triumphant
Let’s shout Hallelujah

hymn_title: We will soon shout Halleluyah
chorus:
Shout Halleluyah
Because God will do new things
Rivers in desert now flowing
Halleluyah to our king
verse_1:
We will soon shout Halleluyah
Because GOD will do new things
Sinners will soon be forgiven
Prodigals will come home soon.
verse_2:
We will soon shout Halleluyah
Because God will do a new things
Sickness and sorrow will be gone
Bondage will be forgotten.
verse_3:
We will soon shout Halleluyah
Because God will do new things
The barren will be fruitful soon
Failure will be forgotten
verse_4:
We will soon shout Halleluyah
Because God will do new things
Poverty will be forgotten
Stagnancy will soon be gone.
verse_5:
We will soon shout Hallelujah
Because God will do new things
To all miracles are given
There shall be celebrations
verse_6:
We will soon shout Halleluyah
Because God will do new things
Many will have testimonies
Of prayers answered fully
verse_7:
We will soon shout Halleluyah
Because God will do new things
One of us will chase a thousand
Two will conquer ten thousands.
verse_8:
We will soon shout Halleluyah
Because God will do new things
Songs of praises we will sing
Halleluyah to our King

hymn_title: Our time has come to hear from God
chorus:
God will give us signs and wonders
And we will shout Halleluyah
And we will shout Halleluyah
verse_1:
Our time has come to hear from God
He will speak peace and joy to us
We will find mercy and favour
Because He will arise for us
verse_2:
Rejoice the sick, you’ll soon be healed
Rejoice the captives, you’ll soon be free
Behold barren, your children come
God will open all barren wombs
verse_3:
Rejoice the poor, you’ll soon be rich
He became poor to make you rich
Behold singles will marry soon
The wedding bell for you will ring
verse_4:
The wind will blow on all dry bones
The blind will see, the dead will rise
The lame will walk, the deaf will hear
The dumb will shout Halleluyah
verse_5:
God will arise, scatter our foes
Anointing will soon overflow
All will confess Jesus as Lord
All knees will bow before our God
verse_6:
God will turn our captivity
Fill our homes with testimonies
Our mouth shall roar with great laughter
And all will shout Halleluyah
verse_7:
And when Jesus shall come again
To take us home with Him to reign
Nothing on earth will keep us down
And we will wear our golden crowns
verse_8:
Halleluyah will be our song
Halleluyah our victory song
Halleluyah both old and young
Halleluyah both loud and long

hymn_title: Are you tired of sickness,pains
chorus:
Let us sing to our King
Let us shout Halleluyah to God
The Floodgates shall open
Floodgates of Heaven
Let us shout great Halleluyah.
verse_1:
Are you tired of sickness,
pains and disease
Let us shout great Halleluyah
Then your healings shall flow
And you shall be whole
Let us shout great Halleluyah
verse_2:
Are you tired of poverty,
lack and loss
Let us shout great Halleluyah
Then your wealth shall flourish
And you will be rich
Let us shout great Halleluyah
verse_3:
Are you tired of failing
from day to day
Let us shout great Halleluyah
Then your success begins
To great heights leading
Let us shout great Halleluyah
verse_4:
Are you tired of defeats
from enemies
Let us shout great Halleluyah
Then your triumphs begin
And you shall reign
Let us shout great Halleluyah
verse_5:
Are you tired of barrenness
month by month
Let us shout great Halleluyah
Then your babies shall come
Your joy overwhelm
Let us shout great Halleluyah
verse_6:
Are you tired of bondage
from hosts of hell
Let us shout great Halleluyah
Then your freedom shall come
As you overcome
Let us shout great Halleluyah
verse_7:
Are you tired, frustrated
and in despair
Let us shout great Halleluyah
You will soon celebrate
You will jubilate
Let us shout great Halleluyah
verse_8:
Are you weak and feeble
in your Christian walk
Let us shout great Halleluyah
Holy Spirit shall come
Your power blossom
Let us shout great Halleluyah
verse_9:
Are you looking forward
for the King’s return
Let us shout great Halleluyah
He will soon re-appear
In the sky and air
Let us shout great Halleluyah
verse_10:
Are you serving Jesus
with your heart and soul
Let us shout great Halleluyah
You will soon reign with Him
In His great kingdom
Let us shout great Halleluyah

chorus:

Singing Halleluyah

(Halleluyah we are)
Singing Halleluyah
Singing Halleluyah
Shouting Halleluyah to God

dominion in all situations
that may come my way
I am seated with Jesus in
all His glory Far above
powers, principalities.

dominion over pains,over
sickness and diseases
I am seated seated with
Jesus in all His glory
Far above powers, principalities
verse_3:

dominion over sins, over
bondage and demons
I am seated with Jesus in
all His glory Far above
powers, principalities
verse_4:
I am certain I have full
dominion over loss, over
failure and defeat
I am seated with Jesus
in all His glory Far above
powers, principalities
verse_5:
I am certain I have
dominion over death,
over sorrow and despair
I am seated with Jesus

principalities
verse_6:
I am certain I have full
dominion over bareness

I am seated with Jesus in

verse_7:
I am certain I have full
dominion over hell, backsliding,
apostacy I am seated with

verse_8:
I am certain I have full
dominion my mockers are now
silenced forever
I am seated with Jesus in

verse_9:
I am certain I have full
dominion I an indomitable
now and ever

verse_10:

dominion my own sun will
